cloud.name: prowler
cloud.description: Cloud security assessment using Prowler. Audits AWS/Azure/GCP configurations against CIS benchmarks.

cloud.name: trivy
cloud.description: Container and filesystem vulnerability scanner using Trivy.

forensics.name: exiftool
forensics.description: Extract metadata from files using ExifTool.

forensics.name: volatility
forensics.description: Memory forensics using Volatility 3. Analyze memory dumps for processes, network connections, and artifacts.

exploit.name: metasploit
exploit.description: Metasploit RPC integration. Execute exploits, generate payloads, and manage sessions via MSFRPC.

exploit.name: searchsploit
exploit.description: Search Exploit-DB for exploits matching a given term or CVE.

c2.name: evil-winrm
c2.description: Evil-WinRM for Windows remote command execution via WinRM.

c2.name: pupy
c2.description: Pupy C2 deployment and management. Generate and deploy cross-platform implants for post-exploitation.

phishing.name: gophish
phishing.description: GoPhish phishing campaign management. Create and manage phishing campaigns via the GoPhish API.

web.name: gobuster
web.description: Directory/file enumeration using gobuster. Brute-forces directories and files on web servers.

web.name: nuclei
web.description: Vulnerability scanner using nuclei templates. Scans targets with 4000+ vulnerability templates.

web.name: sqlmap
web.description: SQL injection detection and exploitation using sqlmap. Automates detection and exploitation of SQLi flaws.

recon.name: nmap
recon.description: Port scan a target using nmap. Discovers open ports, running services, and OS detection.

recon.name: subfinder
recon.description: Passive subdomain enumeration using subfinder. Discovers subdomains from public sources.
